message.content:
Review the ARY design prototype for visual consistency against the design护栏 (guardrails) documented in design-prototype/README.md Section 4.

Check the following files:
1. D:\Desktop\ary-grs-003-CHEF-Ch\design-prototype\styles.css — verify all colors use CSS variables from :root, no arbitrary hex values
2. D:\Desktop\ary-grs-003-CHEF-Ch\design-prototype\index.html — scan all visible text for PRD language or requirement/implementation terms that shouldn't appear in user-facing UI
3. D:\Desktop\ary-grs-003-CHEF-Ch\design-prototype\script.js — check for any hardcoded race names, rider names, work names that should come from sampleData

Specific checks:
- Does any page title use a slogan instead of an object name? (e.g., "让 Agent 带你玩转大湾区" would be a slogan)
- Do visible page labels contain PRD terms like "requirement", "scope", "eligibility", "MVP", "should", "must"?
- Are any hardcoded strings in script.js that should come from sampleData?
- Do all colors trace back to --blue-*, --ink, --muted, --line, --glass, --cyan variables?
- Does the right dashboard/CTA area on any page express "CA 接入失败 = 不可参赛" old rules?
- Are there any independent Leaderboard modules on the Home page?
- Does any Console entry or admin function appear in the public header nav?

Report every violation found, no matter how small.

- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

1	# ARY UX-1 高保真原型
2	
3	版本：v0.3
4	任务：UX-1 高保真原型与设计基线
5	入口：`index.html`
6	
7	---
8	
9	# 1. 本轮定位
10	
11	本目录是 UX-1 第一轮高保真原型产物。
12	
13	本轮遵循 `docs/ux-hifi.taskbook.md` 中确认的原则：
14	
15	```text
16	视觉为主，体验为先；最终产物一定是高保真原型。
17	```
18	
19	因此，本轮重点不是完整业务流程、完整权限矩阵或完整异常状态，而是先建立 ARY 的产品第一印象、视觉气质、关键场景和可走查主路径。
20	
21	---
22	
23	# 2. 原型覆盖
24	
25	当前原型改为按 IA 组织的 10 个高保真页面：
26	
27	| 页面 | 目的 |
28	| --- | --- |
29	| Race Gallery | 建立 Gallery-first 的公开赛事入口和传播感。 |
30	| Race Page | 表达单场 Race 上下文、状态 CTA 和内部导航。 |
31	| Live Hall | 展示 Agent Racing 正在发生，突出骑手动态、成本、风险和过程 Projection。 |
32	| Works / Work Page | 表达作品列表、作品资产和 Evidence 摘要入口。 |
33	| Results | 表达 Award / final leaderboard 与过程 Projection 分离。 |
34	| Review | 表达赛事复盘、评审总结和公开 Evidence。 |
35	| Rider Profile | 表达 Rider 能力资产、作品、奖项和标签。 |
36	| Cooperation | 表达报名、办赛、赞助和合作转化入口。 |
37	| Race Console | 展示 Organizer / Rider / Judge / Admin 入口和高密度办赛控制台。 |
38	| Screen Display | 展示大屏输出，并把 Screen Console 控制面分开。 |
39	
40	# 2.1 样例数据
41	
42	样例数据入口：
43	
44	```text
45	design-prototype/data/sample-races.json
46	design-prototype/data/sample-races.js
47	```
48	
49	`sample-races.json` 服务高保真原型，不是生产 schema；`sample-races.js` 是为了让 `file://` 方式打开原型时也能直接加载数据的浏览器桥接文件。当前包含：
50	
51	* 8 场样例赛事。
52	* 运行中赛事：`湾区开心游`、`智能投研助理`。
53	* 报名中赛事：`网商经营 Copilot`、`健康习惯教练`。
54	* 评审中赛事：`自媒体运营 Agent`。
55	* 已完成赛事：`创世骑行挑战赛`、`政务办事导航 Agent`。
56	* 即将开放赛事：`医疗随访助手`。
57	* Rider、Work、Live Projection、Award、Review、Profile、Console Task 样例。
58	
59	当前主要页面已接入样例数据渲染，用于支撑 IA 页面中的赛事状态差异、作品资产、赛果、复盘、Rider Profile、控制台任务和 Screen Display 指标。
60	
61	当前可走查的主路径：
62	
63	```text
64	Home / Race Gallery
65	→ Race Page / Live Hall
66	→ Work / Results / Rider 资产入口
67	→ Screen Display
68	```
69	
70	辅助路径：
71	
72	```text
73	Console
74	→ Judge View
75	→ Screen Display
76	```
77	
78	---
79	
80	# 3. 视觉方向
81	
82	本轮视觉关键词：
83	
84	* 赛事现场感
85	* 公开传播
86	* Agent Riding 动态过程
87	* 专业工作台
88	* 大屏远距离可读
89	* Gallery-first
90	* 蓝白竞赛视觉
91	* 1080P 高信息密度
92	
93	Public Site 的方向参考“蓝白赛马竞赛海报 / 课程赛事发布页”：强标题、速度线、赛道视觉、玻璃卡、多层信息面板和章节编号。
94	
95	Console 的方向是稳定、清晰、可操作的高密度赛事控制台，不追求低信息密度的营销页式留白。
96	
97	Screen Display 的方向是现场可观看的大屏输出，不是后台表格放大版。
98	
99	桌面端主设计视口为 1920 x 1080。
100	
101	---
102	
103	# 4. 设计护栏
104	
105	本轮原型保留以下护栏，避免高保真方向明显跑偏：
106	
107	* 首页保持 Gallery-first，不做后台功能索引。
108	* Public Header 只承载 Races / Works / Riders / Cooperation；未登录态显示 Login，已登录态才额外显示 Workspace / Console Entry。
109	* 首页顶部不额外强调 Series / Gallery title；当前展示对象由 Hero 内居中的 live Race title 表达。
110	* Home Hero 的阅读顺序固定为：居中赛事标题 → 下划线式 Live Race 切换器 → 赛题 → 指标和主 CTA；切换器不重复显示赛事名，当前对象由标题表达。
111	* Home Hero 必须与 Featured Race 合体，首屏直接展示赛事名、赛题、状态、时间、人数、作品数和主 CTA，不用泛品牌口号替代赛事信息。
112	* Home / Race Gallery 的 Hero / Featured Races 必须直接支持 live Race 切换，不另设独立 Live Now 框；Latest Results 和 Past Races 避免重复同一批赛事。
113	* 首页右侧辅助入口默认收起为窄 Rail；用户点击后从右侧打开 Drawer，展示 Open Registration、Latest Results、Past Races 和 Cooperation 四个模块。
114	* Home / Race Gallery 不设置独立 Leaderboards 模块；过程榜留在 Live Hall，最终榜留在 Results，首页只保留具体作品和 Rider 资产入口。
115	* Race 是公开端和工作台的核心上下文。
116	* Console Entry 不抢占公开端主视觉。
117	* Public 主导航不放 Console / Screen；管理端通过独立 Workspace 入口进入，Screen Display 从 Screen Console 语境进入。
118	* Results 保持单场赛果页，不混入其他报名中、评审中或即将开放赛事。
119	* Works 必须呈现公开作品列表、筛选 / 排序和作品详情入口。
120	* 实时 CA 接入是骑行过程证据和评审参考，不是参赛资格硬门禁。
121	* GitHub Repo 不表达为实时 CA 接入替代物。
122	* CA 未接入、空骑行或接入异常表达为证据缺口 / 评审风险提示，不表达为自动退赛或提交阻断。
123	* Projection 只表达过程展示，不表达最终事实源。
124	* 原始 CA Session 默认不公开。
125	* Screen Console 是控制面，Screen Display 是展示输出面。
126	* 页面可见文案只呈现赛场、作品、榜单、Rider 和现场内容，不使用 PRD 口吻、需求说明、功能解释或实现术语。
127	* 二级页面标题不使用口号式大字，只使用对象名、赛事名、Rider 名和状态摘要。
128	* 后续页面新增或整改前，先使用 `.agents/skills/hifi-ui-page-workflow/SKILL.md` 的页面工作流，明确 IA 合约、数据面和已通过页面的视觉 / 交互惯例。
129	* 样例数据不足时，先按 Domain Model 补足 `data/sample-races.json` 和 `data/sample-races.js`，再设计页面层级；不得用宣传口号、需求描述或假字段填补信息空洞。
130	* 新页面完成后，必须回看首页已通过惯例：对象标题、下划线切换、右侧 Drawer / Rail、低噪状态标签、高密度但有呼吸的 1080P 布局、蓝白竞赛视觉和 CTA 层级。
131	
132	更细的权限、状态机、异常恢复和接口约束留给后续架构、开发和 QA 阶段完善。
133	
134	---
135	
136	# 5. 验收关注点
137	
138	本轮评审建议重点看：
139	
140	* ARY 是否一眼区别于普通 Hackathon 平台或后台系统。
141	* Home / Race Gallery 是否有公开赛事传播力。
142	* 原型是否符合 `ary-mvp.ia.md` 的页面层级，而不是只做场景展板。
143	* 1920 x 1080 视口下信息密度是否足够承载 ARY 的多信息点。
144	* Live Hall 是否有实时赛事观看感。
145	* Console 是否具备专业工作台气质。
146	* Works、Results、Review、Rider Profile 是否能表达资产沉淀。
147	* Screen Display 是否具备现场大屏冲击力和远距离可读性。
148	* Public 观看路径是否可以用高保真原型讲清楚。
149	
150	本轮验证截图：
151	
152	```text
153	design-prototype/ary-design-prototype-data-home-1080p.png
154	design-prototype/ary-design-prototype-data-results-1080p.png
155	```
156	
157	本轮不建议重点评审：
158	
159	* 全量权限细节。
160	* 全量异常状态。
161	* 完整接口字段。
162	* 完整业务状态机。
163	* P1 / P2 平台化能力。
164
